ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the instrument */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES instrument_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the instrument type (e.g., equity, fixed income, commodity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data point */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the instrument on that date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., research, portfolio management, IT) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_instruments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level of the user for the instrument (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_instruments" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates for the instrument from the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_sentiment" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sentiment data point */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the instrument on that date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_sentiment_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_sentiment_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation data point */,
  "instrument1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first financial instrument */,
  "instrument2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second financial instrument */,
  "correlation_coefficient" REAL /* Correlation coefficient between the two instruments */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period of the correlation calculation (e.g., 1 day, 1 week, 1 month) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_correlations_instrument2_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument2_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_correlations_instrument1_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument1_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_volatility" (
  "volatility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the volatility data point */,
  "volatility_score" REAL /* Volatility score of the instrument on that date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volatility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_volatility_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_volatility_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trend data point */,
  "trend_score" REAL /* Trend score of the instrument on that date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_trends_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_trends_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_momentum" (
  "momentum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each momentum data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the momentum data point */,
  "momentum_score" REAL /* Momentum score of the instrument on that date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("momentum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_momentum_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_momentum_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_instruments" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data point */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance data point */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the portfolio on that date */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolio ("portfolio_id")
)
